tables.name: league
tables.description: Football/soccer leagues from various European countries. Contains 8 leagues.

columns.name: country_name
columns.description: Country where the league is based. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Germany', 'England', 'Switzerland', 'Italy', 'Portugal'.

columns.name: name
columns.description: Full official name of the league. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Germany 1. Bundesliga', 'England Premier League', 'Italy Serie A'.

tables.name: player
tables.description: Basic biographical information about football/soccer players. Contains 98 players.

columns.name: birthday
columns.description: Player's date of birth. Type: TEXT (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS format). Examples: '1980-11-25 00:00:00', '1992-03-30 00:00:00'.

columns.name: height
columns.description: Player's height in centimeters. Type: TEXT (decimal string). Examples: '182.88', '177.8', '187.96'.

columns.name: player_name
columns.description: Full name of the player. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Aaron Mokoena', 'Aco Stojkov', 'Abdoulaye Diallo'.

columns.name: weight
columns.description: Player's weight in pounds. Type: TEXT (numeric string). Examples: '181', '165', '174', '154'.

tables.name: player_attributes
tables.description: Detailed skill ratings and attributes for football/soccer players at a specific point in time, similar to FIFA game ratings. Contains 95 records.

columns.name: acceleration
columns.description: Player's acceleration rating (0-100 scale). Type: TEXT (decimal string). How quickly the player reaches top speed.

columns.name: aggression
columns.description: Player's aggression rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. Willingness to challenge for the ball.

columns.name: agility
columns.description: Player's agility rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. Ability to change direction quickly.

columns.name: attacking_work_rate
columns.description: Player's offensive work rate. Type: TEXT. Values include 'medium', 'high', 'low'.

columns.name: balance
columns.description: Player's balance rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. Ability to maintain stability under pressure.

columns.name: ball_control
columns.description: Player's ball control rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. Ability to control and trap the ball.

columns.name: crossing
columns.description: Player's crossing ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Accuracy of crosses from wide positions.

columns.name: curve
columns.description: Player's curve rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. Ability to curve the ball when passing or shooting.

columns.name: date
columns.description: Date when these attribute ratings were recorded. Type: TEXT (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS). Examples: '2013-09-20 00:00:00'.

columns.name: defensive_work_rate
columns.description: Player's defensive work rate. Type: TEXT. Values include 'medium', 'high', 'low'.

columns.name: dribbling
columns.description: Player's dribbling ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Skill at moving with the ball at feet.

columns.name: finishing
columns.description: Player's finishing ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Accuracy when shooting at goal from close range.

columns.name: free_kick_accuracy
columns.description: Player's free kick accuracy (0-100). Type: TEXT. Precision when taking free kicks.

columns.name: gk_diving
columns.description: Goalkeeper diving ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Low values for non-goalkeepers.

columns.name: gk_handling
columns.description: Goalkeeper handling ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Ability to hold onto the ball after a save.

columns.name: gk_kicking
columns.description: Goalkeeper kicking ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Distance and accuracy of goal kicks.

columns.name: gk_positioning
columns.description: Goalkeeper positioning ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Ability to be in the right place.

columns.name: gk_reflexes
columns.description: Goalkeeper reflexes (0-100). Type: TEXT. Reaction speed to close-range shots.

columns.name: heading_accuracy
columns.description: Player's heading accuracy (0-100). Type: TEXT. Precision when heading the ball.

columns.name: interceptions
columns.description: Player's interception ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Ability to read and intercept passes.

columns.name: jumping
columns.description: Player's jumping ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Vertical leap height.

columns.name: long_passing
columns.description: Player's long passing accuracy (0-100). Type: TEXT. Accuracy of long-range passes.

columns.name: long_shots
columns.description: Player's long shot ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Accuracy and power from distance.

columns.name: marking
columns.description: Player's marking ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Ability to track and stay close to opponents.

columns.name: overall_rating
columns.description: Player's overall rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. Composite score of all abilities. Examples: '67.0', '62.0', '72.0'.

columns.name: penalties
columns.description: Player's penalty kick taking ability (0-100). Type: TEXT.

columns.name: player_name
columns.description: Full name of the player these attributes belong to. References player.player_name. Type: TEXT.

columns.name: positioning
columns.description: Player's attacking positioning (0-100). Type: TEXT. Ability to find space in the box.

columns.name: potential
columns.description: Player's potential overall rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. Maximum rating the player could reach.

columns.name: preferred_foot
columns.description: Player's preferred/dominant foot. Type: TEXT. Values: 'right' or 'left'.

columns.name: reactions
columns.description: Player's reaction speed (0-100). Type: TEXT. How quickly the player responds to situations.

columns.name: short_passing
columns.description: Player's short passing accuracy (0-100). Type: TEXT.

columns.name: shot_power
columns.description: Player's shot power (0-100). Type: TEXT. Strength of shots.

columns.name: sliding_tackle
columns.description: Player's sliding tackle ability (0-100). Type: TEXT.

columns.name: sprint_speed
columns.description: Player's sprint speed (0-100). Type: TEXT. Maximum running speed.

columns.name: stamina
columns.description: Player's stamina (0-100). Type: TEXT. Ability to maintain performance over full match.

columns.name: standing_tackle
columns.description: Player's standing tackle ability (0-100). Type: TEXT.

columns.name: strength
columns.description: Player's physical strength (0-100). Type: TEXT.

columns.name: vision
columns.description: Player's vision (0-100). Type: TEXT. Ability to spot passing opportunities.

columns.name: volleys
columns.description: Player's volley ability (0-100). Type: TEXT. Accuracy when striking the ball in mid-air.

tables.name: team
tables.description: Football/soccer teams with short and long names. Contains 100 teams.

columns.name: team_long_name
columns.description: Full official name of the team. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'Stoke City', 'Tottenham Hotspur', 'SC Bastia', 'Wolverhampton Wanderers'.

columns.name: team_short_name
columns.description: Abbreviated 3-letter code for the team. Type: TEXT. Examples: 'STK', 'TOT', 'BAS', 'WOL', 'MOU'.

tables.name: team_attributes
tables.description: Tactical and strategic attributes for football/soccer teams at a specific point in time, similar to FIFA game team ratings. Contains 22 records.

columns.name: build_up_play_passing
columns.description: Build-up play passing rating (0-100). Type: TEXT (numeric string). How much the team relies on passing during build-up.

columns.name: build_up_play_passing_class
columns.description: Classification of build-up passing style. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Mixed', 'Long', 'Short'.

columns.name: build_up_play_positioning_class
columns.description: Build-up play positional strategy. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Organised', 'Free Form'.

columns.name: build_up_play_speed
columns.description: Build-up play speed rating (0-100). Type: TEXT (numeric string). How quickly the team transitions from defense to attack.

columns.name: build_up_play_speed_class
columns.description: Classification of build-up speed. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Balanced', 'Slow', 'Fast'.

columns.name: chance_creation_crossing
columns.description: Chance creation crossing rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. Tendency to create chances via crosses.

columns.name: chance_creation_crossing_class
columns.description: Classification of crossing tendency. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Normal', 'Lots', 'Little'.

columns.name: chance_creation_passing
columns.description: Chance creation passing rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. Tendency to create chances via passing.

columns.name: chance_creation_passing_class
columns.description: Classification of passing tendency in chance creation. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Normal', 'Risky', 'Safe'.

columns.name: chance_creation_positioning_class
columns.description: Positioning style in chance creation. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Organised', 'Free Form'.

columns.name: chance_creation_shooting
columns.description: Chance creation shooting rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. Tendency to shoot when creating chances.

columns.name: chance_creation_shooting_class
columns.description: Classification of shooting tendency. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Normal', 'Lots', 'Little'.

columns.name: date
columns.description: Date when these team attributes were recorded. Type: TEXT (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS). Examples: '2010-02-22 00:00:00'.

columns.name: defence_aggression
columns.description: Defensive aggression rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. How aggressively the team defends.

columns.name: defence_aggression_class
columns.description: Classification of defensive aggression. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Press', 'Contain', 'Double'.

columns.name: defence_defender_line_class
columns.description: Defender line strategy. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Cover', 'Offside Trap'.

columns.name: defence_pressure
columns.description: Defensive pressure rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. How high up the pitch the team presses.

columns.name: defence_pressure_class
columns.description: Classification of defensive pressure level. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Medium', 'High', 'Deep'.

columns.name: defence_team_width
columns.description: Defensive team width rating (0-100). Type: TEXT. How wide the team spreads when defending.

columns.name: defence_team_width_class
columns.description: Classification of defensive width. Type: TEXT. Values: 'Normal', 'Wide', 'Narrow'.

columns.name: team_long_name
columns.description: Full name of the team these attributes belong to. References team.team_long_name. Type: TEXT.
